rulings.Case Title: NIMER A. MASSIS VS. BRANDY SUMMERS RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT BRANDY RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil OFF CALENDAR, Moot. Substitution of attorney filed on May 24, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER A. MASSIS VS. BRANDY SUMMERS RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Civil
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN ROBINSON's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Civil OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally no proof of service on Mr. Parsley. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNABELLE YASAY AGUAYO VS. MARK WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Cross-Complaint And First Amended Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT MARK WILLIAMS' Motion For Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Cross-Complaint And First Amended Answer Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERTO CORREA VS. MARGARITA CONTRERAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs MARGARITA CONTRERAS, ANA MURGA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. Non-Opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 501 COLUMBUS, LLC VS. BRYAN CLUM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT BRYAN CLUM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith compliance with SFRO 37.9(c), i.e. that form 1007 has been served with the operative notice of eviction. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERMAN HOLLAND ET AL VS. PATRICIA THAXTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motin And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT PATRICIA THAXTON's Motion For Attorney'S Fees GRANTED in the amount of $1,225 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant is the prevailing party and is entitled to recovery of attorney's fees per the operative Lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISSETTE IRIZARRY VS. LETICIA RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANTs LETICIA RUIZ, FRANCISCO RUIZ, JOSE RIVERA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend Notice is fatally defective as it fails to comply with SFRO requirements, including the limitation in the Notice to the delivery of the written statement to the authorized agent by specified means, excluding submission to the owner (landlord) and submission by other means. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACKIE JOUBERT VS. HEATHER ALEGRIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Jackie Joubert, Responses To Written Discovery, For A Continuance Of The Trial Date And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 5, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT HEATHER ALEGRIA's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Jackie Joubert, Responses To Written Discovery, For A Continuance Of The Trial Date And For Sanctions Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)
